title: UiPath Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
text: UiPath reported Q4 FY2025 earnings. Q4 FY2025 Results: Revenue $424M (+5% YoY), ARR $1.666B (+14% YoY), Net new ARR $60M, Dollar-based net retention 110%, GAAP operating income $34M, Non-GAAP operating income $134M, Non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow $145M. Full Year FY2025 Results: Revenue $1.430B (+9% YoY), Net new ARR $202M, GAAP operating loss $(163)M, Non-GAAP operating income $241M, Non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow $328M, Cash position $1.7B. EPS (Q4): GAAP diluted EPS $0.09, Non-GAAP diluted EPS $0.26. FY2026 Guidance: Q1 Revenue $330-335M, ARR $1.686-1.691B, Non-GAAP operating income ~$45M. Full Year Revenue $1.525-1.530B, ARR $1.816-1.821B, Non-GAAP operating income ~$270M. CEO Daniel Dines emphasized, "Fiscal 2025 was our most innovative year in recent history, introducing a wealth of new AI capabilities." He highlighted progress in "stabilizing our go-to-market organization" and "accelerating innovation." CFO Ashim Gupta noted increased macro uncertainty affecting guidance, stating the company observed "increasing global macro economic uncertainty, particularly in the U.S. public sector."
